name: child-leaf-onto-leaf
_note: Controlled repro of the 'can't child onto a non-container' case. A progress (like the HUD radial fill) is NOT a container kind, so dragging a text onto it cannot reparent — watch the filmstrip: the text free-moves and snaps over the progress but stays a SIBLING (the tree depth is unchanged). The canvas now shows no drop-target highlight on the progress, and the drag is a plain move. Contrast with child-leaf-into-overlay.json.
